strains.name: Super Skunk
strains.description: A robust, highly potent strain bred from Skunk #1 and an Afghan resin plant, known for its deeply relaxing effects and sweet, earthy aroma.

strains.name: Big Bud
strains.description: Renowned for its massive yields and huge buds. Delivers a potent, long-lasting indica stone.

strains.name: Shiva Skunk
strains.description: Sensi Seeds' most potent Skunk variety, offering a powerful indica body high combined with a mild sativa mental uplift.

strains.name: Black Domina
strains.description: A pure, heavy indica known for its intensely dark foliage and deep, narcotic physical relaxation that is perfect for late evenings.

strains.name: Silver Haze
strains.description: A beloved Sativa-dominant classic that delivers a clear-headed, uplifting cerebral high alongside an earthy, sweet pine aroma.

strains.name: Jack Herer
strains.description: A legendary hybrid known for its uplifting cerebral effects and thick resin production. A true classic.

strains.name: Skunk #1
strains.description: The world's first stable Indica-Sativa hybrid, known for its extreme hybrid vigor, robust growth, and balanced euphoric effects.

strains.name: OG Kush
strains.description: A legendary hybrid known for its earthy pine and sour lemon scent with woody undertones. Delivers a heavy, couch-locking euphoria paired with stress relief.

strains.name: Blue Dream
strains.description: A sativa-dominant hybrid producing a gentle cerebral invigoration and full-body relaxation. Sweet berry aroma and a smooth, creamy smoke.

strains.name: Charlotte's Web
strains.description: A high-CBD, low-THC cultivar bred for therapeutic use. Widely recognized for its role in managing seizure disorders and inflammation without psychoactive effects.

strains.name: Gelato
strains.description: A dessert-like hybrid with a sweet, citrus and lavender aroma. Offers a balanced head and body high with euphoric, creative effects.

strains.name: Northern Lights
strains.description: One of the most famous pure indicas. Produces a deeply relaxing, resinous euphoria with earthy, sweet notes. A classic choice for insomnia and pain relief.

strains.name: Chemdawg
strains.description: A mysterious strain of uncertain origin, believed to have emerged from a cannabis seed found at a Grateful Dead concert in 1991. Known for its pungent diesel aroma and potent cerebral effects. A foundational parent of many modern hybrids.

strains.name: Hindu Kush
strains.description: A pure Indica landrace originating from the Hindu Kush mountain range between Afghanistan and Pakistan. Produces dense, resinous buds with a characteristic earthy and woody aroma. Widely used as a breeding stock for Indica varieties worldwide.

strains.name: Blueberry
strains.description: Created by the legendary breeder DJ Short in the 1970s, Blueberry is an Indica-dominant hybrid prized for its vivid blue and purple hues and unmistakable sweet blueberry aroma. A High Times Cannabis Cup winner with deeply relaxing effects.

strains.name: Haze
strains.description: Originating in Santa Cruz, California in the 1960s–70s, Haze is a pure Sativa landrace cross that became the cornerstone of countless modern Sativa hybrids. It has an exceptionally long flowering time but delivers unparalleled cerebral, energetic highs with a complex, spiced citrus aroma.

strains.name: Afghani
strains.description: One of the oldest and most widely cultivated cannabis landraces, originating from the Afghani highlands. Produces heavy, resinous buds with an earthy, hash-like aroma. Foundational breeding stock for countless Indica-dominant strains.

strains.name: Thai
strains.description: A pure Sativa landrace from Thailand, historically known as 'Thai Stick'. Produces a soaring, cerebral high with a long flowering period. Its genetics have contributed to many classic Sativa hybrids including Northern Lights and Haze crosses.

strains.name: Stanley Brothers Hemp (Proprietary Phenotype)
strains.description: Proprietary industrial hemp phenotype used as the foundation for Charlotte's Web. Specific genetic details are not publicly disclosed.

strains.name: Ruderalis
strains.description: Cannabis Ruderalis landrace from Central Asia. The autoflowering parent used in virtually all modern autoflowering hybrids.

strains.name: Gorilla Glue Auto
strains.description: FastBuds' flagship autoflower, derived from the legendary GG4. Produces enormous resinous buds bursting with Caryophyllene and a diesel-pine nose, delivering a powerful, full-body relaxation.

strains.name: Wedding Cheesecake Auto
strains.description: A rich cross of Wedding Cake genetics brought into autoflower form. Sweet vanilla pastry aromas blend with sharp cheese undertones, producing a deeply relaxing, mood-lifting high.

strains.name: Zkittlez Auto
strains.description: The autoflowering version of the multi-Cup-winning Zkittlez. Produces candy-sweet, tropical flavors and a profoundly relaxing body high ideal for beginners and veterans alike.

strains.name: Girl Scout Cookies Auto
strains.description: The iconic GSC lineage in compact autoflower format. Delivers a well-balanced euphoric and relaxing high backed by its signature sweet, minty, earthy flavor profile.

strains.name: OG Kush Auto
strains.description: FastBuds' take on the legendary OG Kush, now in a fast-finishing auto. The classic earthy, lemon-pine profile and heavy euphoric body stone are fully preserved in this beginner-friendly package.

strains.name: Blue Dream Auto
strains.description: The beloved Blue Dream transferred to autoflower genetics. Retains its signature sweet blueberry aroma and balanced sativa-leaning high, finishing in just 9–10 weeks from seed.

strains.name: Strawberry Gorilla Auto
strains.description: A cross between Gorilla Glue #4 and a strawberry phenotype, delivering massive THC levels and an addictive sweet-diesel aroma. One of FastBuds' highest-yielding autos.

strains.name: West Coast OG Auto
strains.description: A West Coast expression of OG Kush genetics selected for potency and bag appeal. Dense, trichome-coated buds with a piney-earthy nose and a deeply sedating, classic OG stone.

strains.name: Californian Snow Auto
strains.description: A sun-grown Californian-inspired Sativa auto with bright citrus and sweet herbal aromas. The stimulating, creative high makes it a great daytime companion, finishing in under 10 weeks.

strains.name: Pineapple Express Auto
strains.description: The cult-classic Pineapple Express genetics squeezed into a fast autoflower. Bursting with tropical, sweet pineapple aromas and delivering an uplifting, functional sativa buzz.

strains.name: Gelato Auto
strains.description: One of the most powerful autos in the FastBuds catalog, pushing 26–28% THC. Gelato's dessert-sweet citrus and berry profile is faithfully preserved alongside an intensely euphoric hybrid effect.

strains.name: Auto Blueberry
strains.description: A faithful autoflower adaptation of DJ Short's iconic Blueberry. Lower THC makes this an approachable, smooth smoke with a true blueberry sweetness and a mellowing, calm body effect.

strains.name: Auto AK
strains.description: The legendary AK-47 in compact autoflowering form. Delivers the same earthy, spicy, well-rounded high that made AK-47 a global classic, now ready in under 9 weeks from seed.

strains.name: Amnesia Haze Auto
strains.description: The celebrated Amnesia Haze brought to autoflower growers. A cerebral, energetic sativa experience with complex citrus-lemon-earth tones, now accessible without a long photoperiod season.

strains.name: Crystal Meth Auto
strains.description: Named for its extraordinary crystal coverage, Crystal Meth Auto is a high-THC sativa-leaning powerhouse delivering a sharp cerebral buzz with sweet citrus aromas and explosive resin production.

strains.name: Blackberry Auto
strains.description: A fragrant berry-forward indica auto with deep purple hues under cool temperatures. Delivers a sweet blackberry and grape flavor and a cozy, relaxing body stone ideal for evenings.

strains.name: Do-Si-Dos Auto
strains.description: FastBuds' autoflower version of the potent Do-Si-Dos. Heavy Indica genetics deliver a deeply sedating, euphoric high with sweet floral and earthy notes — a top-shelf evening strain.

strains.name: Banana Purple Punch Auto
strains.description: A fruity, dessert-like cross that combines banana and purple berry notes from its Purple Punch lineage. Produces visually striking purple buds and a heavy, tranquilizing Indica effect.

strains.name: Tangie Auto
strains.description: The zesty Tangie lineage in autoflower form. Bursts with fresh orange and citrus aromas underpinned by tropical sweetness, delivering a bright, uplifting sativa high in under 10 weeks.

strains.name: Purple Lemonade Auto
strains.description: A sativa auto with deep purple coloration and a lemonade-forward terpene profile. Easy to grow, quick to finish, and delivering a joyful, uplifting high with expressive citrus flavors.

strains.name: Cream Cookies Auto
strains.description: Bred from Girl Scout Cookies genetics, Cream Cookies Auto offers a smooth, creamy sweetness with earthy and mint undertones. Balanced hybrid effects lean toward relaxation with a pleasant euphoric lift.

strains.name: Lemon AK Auto
strains.description: A citrus-forward twist on the Auto AK lineage, expressing a strong lemon and fresh herb nose. Energising and creative sativa effects suit daytime use, and it thrives in the hands of beginners.

strains.name: Stardawg Auto
strains.description: Stardawg's pungent diesel and pine character preserved in autoflower form. Delivers a focused, stimulating sativa buzz with a distinct earthy-peppery hash nose and strong resin production.

strains.name: CBD Crack Auto
strains.description: A CBD-rich autoflower with near 1:1 THC:CBD ratio, bred for wellness and daytime therapeutic use. Gentle citrus-herbal aromas and calming, clear-headed effects with no disorienting psychoactivity.

strains.name: Mimosa Auto
strains.description: Inspired by the brunch cocktail, Mimosa Auto delivers sparkling citrus and tropical aromas with a bright, social, uplifting effect — an excellent daytime auto for creative and energetic moods.

strains.name: Peyote Critical Auto
strains.description: A compact, fast-finishing indica auto with Peyote Critical roots. Produces dense, resinous buds with a complex sweet, earthy and spiced aroma and a relaxing, hunger-inducing body effect.

strains.name: Bruce Banner Auto
strains.description: Named after the alter ego of the Hulk, Bruce Banner Auto is one of the most potent in the catalog. A true hybrid with explosive THC levels, sweet diesel aromas, and a soaring euphoric effect.

strains.name: Apple Fritter Auto
strains.description: Apple Fritter Auto brings the award-winning phenotype into autoflower. Dense buds with a sweet baked pastry and earthy aroma deliver a potent balanced effect with a pleasant sativa tilt.

strains.name: Tropicana Cookies Auto
strains.description: A vibrant cross of Tangie and Girl Scout Cookies, Tropicana Cookies Auto explodes with zesty orange and tropical citrus. A creative, uplifting sativa-leaning experience ideal for social settings.

strains.name: Chemdawg Auto
strains.description: The legendary Chemdawg in a fast autoflower format. Preserves the sharp diesel-earth nose and the versatile, introspective cerebral high that made Chemdawg one of the most influential strains ever bred.

strains.name: L.A. Confidential Auto
strains.description: A pure Indica auto inspired by the award-winning L.A. Confidential. Smooth, piney and earthy smoke leads to a fast-onset, deeply sedating body high — a classic evening and insomnia strain.

strains.name: Blue Gelato Auto
strains.description: A premium cross of Blue Dream and Gelato genetics, Blue Gelato Auto combines berry sweetness with citrus floral notes and delivers an intensely euphoric, creative hybrid experience at exceptional potency.

strains.name: Candy Kush Auto
strains.description: A sweet twist on OG Kush genetics, Candy Kush Auto wraps the classic earthy Kush base in a layer of sugary citrus sweetness. A compact, fast-finishing strain with reliable indica relaxation.

strains.name: Amnesia Auto
strains.description: A fast-finishing sativa auto derived from Amnesia Haze roots. Bright lemon-citrus aromas and an energising, cerebral high make it an ideal daytime autoflower for experienced and new growers alike.

strains.name: NYC Diesel Auto
strains.description: The urban-classic NYC Diesel in autoflower form. Pungent diesel and citrus aromas drive a lively, chatty sativa high — social, creative, and perfect for daytime use with a fast seed-to-harvest cycle.

strains.name: Sour Diesel Auto
strains.description: Sour Diesel's iconic pungent fuel-citrus aroma and sharp, cerebral sativa effect preserved in autoflower format. A classic choice for focus and creativity, now accessible in any growing season.

strains.name: LSD-25 Auto
strains.description: LSD-25 Auto delivers a surprisingly psychedelic, visually stimulating experience from potent Indica genetics. Complex earthy tones with hints of spice, producing an introspective and deeply relaxing high.

strains.name: Auto Bubble
strains.description: A beginner-friendly pure Indica auto with gentle THC levels and a sweet, berry-cream aroma. Compact plants deliver calming, easy-going relaxation — a great entry-level auto for new cultivators.

strains.name: Gorilla Punch Auto
strains.description: A cross of Gorilla Glue #4 and Purple Punch genetics, combining heavy resin production with sweet berry aromas. Gorilla Punch Auto hits hard with a balanced euphoric-relaxing effect and exceptional yields.

strains.name: Runtz Auto
strains.description: Runtz Auto brings the coveted candy-sweet tropical flavors of the Runtz lineage into a fast autoflower. Dense, colorful buds deliver a smooth, long-lasting euphoric high with excellent bag appeal.

strains.name: Apple Sherbet Auto
strains.description: A creamy, apple-forward indica-leaning auto with floral and herbal undertones. Apple Sherbet Auto produces resinous buds and a smooth, calm relaxation with a pleasant sweet-citrus aftertaste.

strains.name: Watermelon Auto
strains.description: A refreshingly sweet and tropical indica auto. Watermelon Auto produces flavorful, terpene-rich buds with a genuine watermelon candy aroma and a soothing, hunger-inducing body effect.

strains.name: Grapefruit Auto
strains.description: A zesty, sativa-leaning auto with a sharp grapefruit and citrus aroma. Grapefruit Auto offers a bright, uplifting daytime effect and is simple to grow, making it ideal for beginners seeking a fruity Sativa.

strains.name: Banana Blaze Auto
strains.description: Banana Blaze Auto dazzles with a rich tropical banana aroma and high THC output. Dense indica buds deliver a smooth, sweet-tasting smoke and a relaxing, heavy body stone best enjoyed in the evening.

strains.name: Purple Punch Auto
strains.description: Purple Punch Auto translates the stunning grape-berry indica genetics into compact, fast-finishing plants. Deep purple coloration, a candy-sweet grape aroma, and a profoundly sedating evening effect.

strains.name: Orange Sherbet Auto
strains.description: A cheerful, citrus-forward hybrid auto with a sweet creamy orange sherbet character. Delivers a balanced, mood-lifting and gently relaxing effect — a pleasant all-day companion.

strains.name: Strawberry Pie Auto
strains.description: A fragrant indica-dominant auto with a baked strawberry pastry aroma. Strawberry Pie Auto delivers dense, sticky buds and a smooth, relaxing euphoria with just enough uplift to keep the mood positive.

strains.name: Mimosa Evo Auto
strains.description: An evolved Mimosa phenotype selected for higher potency and more complex tropical citrus terpenes. Mimosa Evo Auto excels as a daytime sativa auto with an effervescent, creative, long-lasting high.

strains.name: Zkittlez OG Auto
strains.description: A fusion of Zkittlez's candy sweetness and OG Kush's earthy depth, brought to autoflower growers. Dense, terpene-rich buds with a complex sweet-earthy profile and a balanced, deeply satisfying high.

strains.name: Kush XL Auto
strains.description: A large-yielding pure Indica auto rooted in Afghani landrace genetics. Kush XL Auto produces compact, resin-heavy plants with an earthy hash aroma and a heavy, couch-locking body stone.

strains.name: Tropicana Cookies
strains.description: Tangie × Girl Scout Cookies (Forum Cut). A Sativa-dominant hybrid by Oni Seed Co known for its bold citrus and confectionary terpene profile. Foundational parent of Tropicanna Punch.

strains.name: Amnesia
strains.description: A Haze-dominant Dutch classic, widely used in European and Colombian breeding programs. Known for powerful cerebral effects and citrus-earth aromas.

strains.name: Nicole Kush
strains.description: Nicole (Marimberos) × Kosher Kush (DNA Genetics). An Indica-dominant hybrid by DNA Genetics used by Black Tuna Co as a key parent in their Limonada de Mango and other Colombian-bred crosses.

strains.name: Tropicanna Punch Line
strains.description: Black Tuna Co's flagship creation — an S1 feminization of their prized Tropicanna Punch #61 phenotype, selected from over 100 specimens of the original Oni Seed Co cross (Tropicana Cookies × Purple Punch). The #61 was chosen for its military-green density, hybrid vigor, and an exceptional grape-chemical aroma unlike any other phenotype in the run. The resulting S1 seeds deliver consistent, near-clone phenotypes with deep purple coloration, dense trichome coverage, and a grape candy profile backed by citrus and sweet undertones. A cornerstone parent across the entire Black Tuna breeding program.

strains.name: Açaí
strains.description: A feminized Sativa-dominant hybrid from Black Tuna Co, bred by crossing The New #122 (Larry OG × GSC) with their celebrated Tropicanna Punch #61 cut. The result is an aromatic cultivar with notes unmistakably reminiscent of açaí berry alongside subtle hints of grape and tropical fruit. Balanced 60% Sativa / 40% Indica expression delivers a creative, uplifting cerebral high that settles into a warm, relaxed body state.

strains.name: Bloodsport
strains.description: A high-resin Sativa-dominant hybrid from Black Tuna Co, created by crossing BloodOath (GMO × (Gorilla Glue #4 × Mendobreath)) with their landmark Tropicanna Punch #61. Delivers a rich aroma of tropical fruit with citrus undertones and a sharp, energetic euphoria. The BloodOath parentage contributes exceptional resin production and physical potency, while the Tropicanna Punch #61 adds visual appeal and aromatic complexity.

strains.name: Rayo Lazer
strains.description: A feminized hybrid from Black Tuna Co, bred by crossing Slapz (Gorilla Glue #4 × Runtz) with Sherbert Shocker (Sunset Sherbet × OZK). Produces an aroma of tropical fruits with creamy citrus notes and a subtle earthiness. Both parent lines are proprietary Black Tuna working cuts; the cross delivers a balanced, calming euphoria suited for creative and social settings.

strains.name: Limonada de Mango F2
strains.description: An F2 generation of Black Tuna Co's Limonada de Mango, refined from an Amnesia × Nicole Kush cross. The F2 stabilization preserves the strain's signature mango-lemon tropical aroma while introducing greater phenotypic diversity for breeders. A Sativa-dominant hybrid delivering an energetic, focused cerebral high with a long-lasting uplifting effect. Strongly influenced by Amnesia's Haze genetics and Colombian heritage, rooted in Black Tuna's Santa Marta breeding environment.

strains.name: Runtz
strains.description: Zkittlez × Gelato. A celebrated hybrid from Cookies bred in California, renowned for its candy-sweet fruit aroma, dense trichome coverage, and balanced high. A foundational parent in countless modern hybrids.

strains.name: MAC 1 (Miracle Alien Cookies)
strains.description: Alien Cookies F2 × (Colombian × Starfighter). Created by breeder Capulator. One of the most coveted clone-only cultivars in the US market, prized for frosty appearance, balanced hybrid effects, and creamy, spiced terpenes.

strains.name: Gary Payton
strains.description: The Y × Snowman (Cookies). A high-potency hybrid from Cookies, named in collaboration with the NBA Hall of Famer. Known for fuel and spicy terpenes with a powerful euphoric effect.

strains.name: Cherry Cookies
strains.description: A cherry-forward GSC-lineage hybrid used as a stud parent in CopyCat Genetix's Cherry Runtz cross. Specific breeder origin not publicly confirmed.

strains.name: Oreoz
strains.description: Cookies and Cream × Secret Weapon. An Indica-dominant hybrid known for extraordinary resin production and a cookies-and-cream dessert terpene profile. Widely used in modern breeding programs.

strains.name: Sour Apple Gelato
strains.description: A Gelato-lineage hybrid selected for sour apple terpenes. Used by CopyCat Genetix as the stud side of the Sour Apple Runtz cross.

strains.name: Cotton Candy Crunch
strains.description: A proprietary CopyCat Genetix selection used as a reversal parent in Cotton Candy Runtz. Specific genetic lineage not publicly disclosed.

strains.name: Gelonade (Original Clone)
strains.description: Gelato 41 × Lemon Tree. Original clone by Connected Cannabis Co. A Sativa-dominant hybrid with an intensely citrus, melon-forward terpene profile. CopyCat Genetix reversed this clone to produce their Gelonade S1 feminized release.

strains.name: Pink Panties
strains.description: Burmese Kush × Florida Kush. An Indica-dominant cultivar with a floral, fruity character. Used by CopyCat Genetix as the female clone parent in the Pink Runtz cross.

strains.name: Mr. Big Stuff
strains.description: An S1 feminized selection by CopyCat Genetix, created by crossing their MAC 1 clone with a Gary Payton reversal — two of the most sought-after US cultivars. Known for towering THC content (31–37%), exceptional frost coverage, and creamy, spiced gelato-fuel terpenes. The breeder describes it as the 'highest yielding frost monster yet.' Flowering time 7–8 weeks. Featured in numerous grow diaries and competition circles.

strains.name: Pink Runtz
strains.description: CopyCat Genetix's take on Pink Runtz, created in-house by crossing a Pink Panties clone to a Runtz reversal and selecting the keeper phenotype for S1 feminization. Boasts over 30% total cannabinoids with THC in the 26–30% range. The cross delivers the candy-sweet fruitiness of Runtz elevated by Pink Panties' floral, berry character — a buzzy, happiness-inducing effect profile.

strains.name: Cherry Runtz
strains.description: A cross of the original Runtz clone with a Cherry Cookies F4 stud, developed by CopyCat Genetix. Terpene profile of cherries, candy, and pure gas. THC 29–32%, with over 30% total cannabinoids. Flowering 8–9 weeks with above-average yields.

strains.name: Mr. Big Runtz
strains.description: CopyCat Genetix's evolution of the Runtz line: the original Runtz clone crossed to a Mr. Big Stuff male stud, then hunted and reversed in-house into feminized S1 seeds. Terpene profile of candy, berry, funk, and gas. THC 31–35%, large yields, 8–9 week flower. Brings Runtz and Mr. Big Stuff to a new potency level.

strains.name: Oreo Big Stuff
strains.description: As seen in High Times. CopyCat Genetix crossed their Mr. Big Stuff cut (MAC 1 × Gary Payton) with an Oreoz #3 reversal, hunting the keeper phenotype in-house before self-feminizing into S1 seeds. Indica-dominant, this is a heavy-hitting frost monster with epic bag appeal — candy, gas, strawberry, vanilla cream terpenes. THC 37–41% (breeder-reported), over 42% total cannabinoids. Flowering 7–8 weeks.

strains.name: Sour Apple Runtz
strains.description: Original Runtz clone crossed with Sour Apple Gelato, bred, hunted, and reversed in-house by CopyCat Genetix to produce feminized S1 seeds. Terpene profile leans sharply sour — sour apples, gas, fuel, funk. THC 31–33%, over 34% total cannabinoids. Large yields in 8–9 weeks.

strains.name: Cotton Candy Runtz
strains.description: Runtz clone crossed with a Cotton Candy Crunch reversal, hunted in-house and feminized by CopyCat Genetix. Terpene profile: cotton candy, candy, gas. THC 27–34%, over 30% total cannabinoids, above-average yield, 8–9 week flower.

strains.name: MAC BX2
strains.description: CopyCat Genetix's MAC backcross program: a MAC F2 female backcrossed to the original MAC F1 clone (CopyCat's own cut) to produce the MAC BX1, then that BX1 was again crossed to the MAC F1 stud to stabilise the MAC BX2 line. Focus: a stable, vigorous, frost-monster expression of MAC that surpasses the original Capulator selection in yield and vigor. Terpenes: spice, earthy, hints of cookie/kush. THC 34–39%, 8–9 week flower.

strains.name: Gelonade
strains.description: CopyCat Genetix reversed the famous Gelonade clone (Gelato 41 × Lemon Tree, by Connected Cannabis Co) to produce feminized S1 seeds of this coveted Sativa-dominant cultivar. Melon, fruit, and hints of OG gas dominate the terpene profile. THC 25–31%, above-average yields in 8–9 weeks indoors.

strains.name: Gelato 33
strains.description: Parent stub — Gelato 33 (Larry Bird) by Cookie Fam Genetics (Sunset Sherbet × Thin Mint GSC). One of the most iconic phenos of the Gelato line.

strains.name: GG4
strains.description: Parent stub — GG4 (Gorilla Glue #4) by GG Strains. A legendary award-winning hybrid famous for its heavy resin production and potent diesel-chocolate terpene profile.

strains.name: Lemon OG
strains.description: Parent stub — Lemon OG by DNA Genetics, a lemon-forward OG Kush variant used in various citrus hybrid crosses.

strains.name: Black Banana
strains.description: Parent stub — Black Banana by Solfire Gardens, used in Bahama Mama and Double Tap.

strains.name: The Don Mega
strains.description: Parent stub — The Don Mega by Solfire Gardens (GMO × Black Banana). Award-winning influential male line, 3rd place at Michigan Cannabis Cup.

strains.name: Mind Flayer
strains.description: Parent stub — Mind Flayer by Solfire Gardens (Double Tap × Why U Gelly). Known for extreme resin density and fruit-gas terpene profile.

strains.name: Last Supper
strains.description: Parent stub — Last Supper by Solfire Gardens, used as a parent in Lemon Elixir and Pineapple Pucker.

strains.name: Udder Madness
strains.description: Parent stub — Udder Madness by Solfire Gardens (Bitties × Mind Flayer). Used in Lung Buster and Gas Guzzler.

strains.name: Gastro Pop
strains.description: Parent stub — Gastro Pop by Compound Genetics (Apricot Gelato × Grape Gas), used as parent in Solfire's Gas Guzzler.

strains.name: Sundae Driver
strains.description: Parent stub — Sundae Driver by Fruity Real Genetics (FPOG × Grape Pie). Used as a parent in Solfire's Hood Candyz.

strains.name: Bahama Mama
strains.description: Solfire Gardens' flagship cultivar. Bahama Mama shows cookie dominance with phenos ranging from citrus to sweet cookie; colors up well late in flower. Loves to be schwazzed and lollipopped; works great in a trellis-style garden. Aroma: Tangerine Berry. Flowering: 56–63 days. Yield: Medium/Heavy.

strains.name: Why U Gelly
strains.description: Solfire Gardens' first feminized reversal. Why U Gelly (aka Gelly) combines Gelato 33 and The Don Mega for creamy, gassy aromas and significant frost production. Heavy yielder. Flowering: 53–63 days.

strains.name: Double Tap
strains.description: Double Tap packs on frost early. Brings the chem funk of the legendary GG4 and pairs it with the frost and color of the Black Banana. A must-have in any garden. Aroma: High Pitch Gas. Flowering: 60–70 days. Yield: Medium/Heavy.

strains.name: Miami Mami
strains.description: Miami Mami is a heavy, colorful hybrid from Solfire Gardens — not a single green pheno in the test. She is hearty, hefty, loves to eat, and puts on a show in late flower. Every plant displayed vivid coloration. Delivers tropical fruit aromas with earthy undertones.

strains.name: Sol Sonic
strains.description: Sol Sonic sports beautiful thin-shaped dark black fan leaves, so black they look iridescent. Her frost is wet to the touch, smelling like cocoa and shop-floor grease. Easy to grow — every pheno threw down dense, dank flowers. Crossing Gary Payton × Mind Flayer. Flowering: 56–63 days. Yield: Heavy.

strains.name: Lung Buster
strains.description: Lung Buster is a heavy-hitting hybrid combining The Don Mega × Udder Madness. Bold diesel, earth, and spice terpenes with fuel-forward intensity. Dense, trichome-coated buds ideal for both premium flower and extraction. THC: 22–28%. Flowering: 8–10 weeks. Yield: High.

strains.name: Lemon Elixir
strains.description: A zesty 50/50 hybrid crossing Lemon OG with Last Supper. Lemon Elixir produces vivid amber, green, and red coloration. High yield, indoor/outdoor versatile. Tropical citrus terpenes with a bright lemon-forward finish. Flowering: ~60 days.

strains.name: Hood Candyz
strains.description: Hood Candyz is a Solfire staple bred from Bahama Mama × Sundae Driver. Sweet candy and berry terpenes with creamy undertones. Widely used as a structural parent in Solfire's later crosses.

strains.name: Block Monster
strains.description: Block Monster from Solfire Gardens combines Mind Flayer and Hood Candyz for a soothing body buzz wrapped in sweet candy aromas with an earthy gas backbone. Heavy frosted structure, ideal for relaxation.

strains.name: Gas Guzzler
strains.description: Gas Guzzler by Solfire Gardens crosses Gastro Pop (Apricot Gelato × Grape Gas) with Udder Madness for a pronounced diesel aroma and punchy fuel-forward terpene profile. Dense resinous buds. Flowering: ~65 days.

strains.name: Future #1
strains.description: An incredibly potent hybrid reaching up to 37% THC. Delivers intense euphoria and energy with a fruity mango and citrus profile.

strains.name: Blackberry Moonrocks
strains.description: A very potent indica-dominant strain. Beautiful dark, frosty buds with a sweet berry and lavender aroma resulting in profound relaxation.

strains.name: Nova OG
strains.description: An extremely potent indica-dominant cross from Canada. Delivers deep physical relaxation with sweet, spicy, and lemon notes.

strains.name: Sleepy Joe
strains.description: Engineered for pure relaxation. Produces overwhelmingly potent full-body effects with sweet berry and lemon flavors.

strains.name: Imperium X
strains.description: One of the strongest strains available, soaring up to 36% THC. Provides a bright, energetic high with tropical and woody undertones.

strains.name: Frozen Black Cherry
strains.description: Extremely potent indica cross famous for intense cherry and berry flavors with heavy THC output.

strains.name: Gelato Dream
strains.description: Sativa-dominant blend providing powerful uplifing effects and delicious sweet citrus flavors.

strains.name: Wham Boom
strains.description: Record-breaking 39% THC. An extreme hybrid with sweet berry and diesel flavors offering immense euphoria.

strains.name: Coco Jambo
strains.description: A very potent tropical hybrid with sweet coconut flavors turning into a deep, happy, creative high.

strains.name: Vanilla Frosting
strains.description: Intense sweet vanilla and earthy flavors. A potent indica-leaning cross causing happy relaxation and rest.

strains.name: Cereal Milk
strains.description: Bred by Cookies Fam. Features a loud, sweet milk and ice cream flavor with an even, relaxing calm paired with a giggly euphoric overtone.

strains.name: Gelato 41
strains.description: Famous deeply relaxing and creatively stimulating hybrid.

strains.name: London Pound Cake 75
strains.description: Indica-dominant hybrid offering a loud berry and lemon-sweet aroma with deep sleepy relaxation.

strains.name: Cherry Pie
strains.description: A core foundation of the Cookies family, smelling of sweet and sour cherry pie.

strains.name: Cheetah Piss
strains.description: Pungent and extremely funky profile reminiscent of its Cat Piss heritage, yielding strong energy.

strains.name: White Runtz
strains.description: Known for thick white trichome scaling and a candied, floral, sweet flavor.

strains.name: Berry Pie
strains.description: A very sweet sativa-leaning hybrid perfect for focused morning usage.

strains.name: Blanco
strains.description: A Lemonnade project bred with Cookies, presenting heavily frosted flowers and a deeply stoney effect.

strains.name: Collins Ave
strains.description: Tart citrus and sweet mint notes paired with a highly sociable and talkative stone.

strains.name: Snowman
strains.description: Sativa-dominant phenotype of GSC crossing. Famous for its heavy trichome coverage and uplifting, creative buzz.

strains.name: Sticky Buns
strains.description: Sticky Buns leaves a sweet, sugary taste in the mouth followed by a cozy, relaxing spread of effects.

strains.name: Georgia Pie
strains.description: Heavy indica-leaning hybrid with a striking aroma of sweet berry and peach cobbler, delivering powerful bodily relaxation.

strains.name: Pancakes
strains.description: Features a buttery, sweet, berry-laden flavor reminiscent of warm pancakes, relaxing yet happily euphoric.

strains.name: Ocean Beach
strains.description: Brings sweet and salty citrus notes along with an uplifting oceanic wave of happiness and talkative vibes.

strains.name: Honey Bun
strains.description: Smells like a brilliantly sweet glazed donut and acts as a strongly euphoric mood-enhancer.

strains.name: Sour Apple Killer
strains.description: Distinct sharp, sweet, and bright citrus-apple aroma with effects that pierce through mental fog, increasing focus.

strains.name: Grenadine
strains.description: Rich cherry and sweet berry profile with a thick calming effect ideal for unwinding after a long day.

strains.name: Pomelo
strains.description: A very bright, zesty, and energetic hybrid delivering focused, creative energy heavily perfumed with ripe citrus.

strains.name: Tequila Sunrise
strains.description: Vibrant and punchy like its namesake cocktail, generating an extremely uplifted and socially talkative environment.

strains.name: Madrina
strains.description: Intense sweet citrus flavors with a focused, creative edge that acts as an excellent mid-day strain.

strains.name: Ooh La La
strains.description: Known as a highly fragrant and floral strain paired with deep, euphoric relaxation.

strains.name: Medellin
strains.description: Named for its potent diesel gas aromas mixed with an uplifting and focused effect profile.

strains.name: Lemonchello 28
strains.description: Extremely pungent lemon hybrid combining uplifting cerebral creativity with deep, stoney relaxation.

strains.name: Apples and Bananas
strains.description: A dense composite hybrid blending prominent baked fruit, apple, and banana pastry aromas with an extremely potent euphoric lift.

strains.name: Laughing Gas
strains.description: True to its name, produces a highly giggly, euphoric, and uplifted high with pungent diesel and pine aromas.

strains.name: Blood Moon
strains.description: Deeply relaxing hybrid with bright citrus and earthy aromas perfect for unwinding after a long day.

strains.name: BernieHana Butter
strains.description: Very loud, sweet buttery and earthy notes that relax the body intensely, often leading to sleep.

strains.name: Ridiculous
strains.description: Delivers an incredibly strong euphoric high alongside rich, robust berry and sweet earth flavors.

strains.name: All Time High
strains.description: True to its name, offers a towering cerebral euphoria complemented by a rich pine and sweet earthy smoke.

strains.name: Pave
strains.description: Minty, sweet, and gas-forward strain renowned for highly crystallized buds and heavily relaxed euphoric effects.

strains.name: Mexican Flan
strains.description: Potent cross resulting in a smooth, sweet, baked-goods aroma matched with heavy couch-locking physical relaxation.

strains.name: That Badu
strains.description: Zesty citrus and sweet earthy undertones promoting focus, creativity, and centered happiness.

strains.name: Hawaiian Snow
strains.description: Sativa powerhouse blending bright tropical and citrus tones with surging euphoric, creative energy.

strains.name: Triple Scoop
strains.description: Produces a rich, complex sweet berry taste layered over happy, heavily euphoric, and relaxed vibes.

strains.name: Nectarine Jelly
strains.description: Exploding with bright citrus and sweet peach-like jelly notes, paired with uplifting happiness.

strains.name: Jealousy
strains.description: Leafly's 2022 Strain of the Year. Very dark, heavy structure with deeply relaxed euphoric qualities.

strains.name: Animal Cookies
strains.description: Heavy yielding indica-dominant hybrid offering a sweet and sour aroma and powerful heavy-body effects.

strains.name: Platinum Cookies
strains.description: Known for its thick coat of crystal resin and extremely uplifting, relaxing waves.

strains.name: GMO Cookies
strains.description: Massively strong skunk and diesel odor with ultra-heavy indica sedation. Extreme THC potential.

strains.name: Grape Cookies
strains.description: Sweet grape notes interwoven with earthy OG funk, leading to heavy sleepy relaxation.

strains.name: Jungle Cookies
strains.description: Potent and woody hybrid that produces a strong euphoric rush paired with physical heaviness.

strains.name: Clown Cookies
strains.description: Fun, bouncy high mixed with heavy hitting pine and sweet earthy aromatics.

strains.name: Biscotti
strains.description: Provides a heavy, relaxing body buzz accompanied by sweet and delicious buttery flavors.

strains.name: Pink Guava
strains.description: Fruity and extremely aromatic tropical hybrid heavily utilized in modern breeding projects.

strains.name: Rainbow Sherbet #11
strains.description: Bred by Wizard Trees. Offers a deeply relaxing body high alongside a bright, euphoric cerebral lift with intense sweet, berry, and pine notes.

strains.name: Zangria
strains.description: Bred by Wizard Trees, crossing Thin Mint Cookies with Zkittlez. Deeply intoxicating aroma of sweet grape and earth with intensely relaxing, sleepy physical stone.

strains.name: Studio 54
strains.description: An alternate pheno hunt selection boasting incredible party-focused and sociable effects, laden with fruit and earth flavors.

strains.name: Route 66
strains.description: Cruising diesel and sweet fruit aroma profile yielding deep, steady body relaxation.

strains.name: Shirazi
strains.description: Deeply dark and fruity strain hitting hard physically, often leading directly to a joyful night of sleep.

strains.name: The Keeper
strains.description: Selected specifically for its elite structural traits and fiercely creative, soaring mental lift.

strains.name: Cream Piez
strains.description: Massive dessert-style trichome producer with extremely heavy appetite stimulation and potent body relaxation.

strains.name: Yuzu
strains.description: Provides extremely loud, zesty Asian yuzu aromas and provides a burst of happy energy.

strains.name: RS54
strains.description: Sister pheno to RS11, boasting a sharper gas and pine profile combined with heavy euphoric effects.

strains.name: Zkittlez
strains.description: Famous award-winning strain producing sweet, candy-like flavors and profound physical relaxation.

strains.name: Gary Payton
strains.description: Cultivated by Cookies. Brings heavy, hard-hitting euphoric effects and an earthy, spicy flavor profile.

strains.name: Wedding Cake
strains.description: Rich and tangy with earthy and pepper notes. Gives exceptionally relaxing and euphoric mind states.

strains.name: Tropicana Cookies
strains.description: Intensely bright citrus notes with an uplifting, sativa-heavy effect profile.

strains.name: Lemon Skunk
strains.description: A citrus-heavy cross.

strains.name: Super Silver Haze
strains.description: A legendary energetic sativa-dominant strain.

strains.name: Brazilian Sativa
strains.description: An original landrace sativa from Brazil.

strains.name: South Indian Indica
strains.description: An original landrace indica from South India.

strains.name: Neville's Haze
strains.description: A very tall and intense sativa.

strains.name: Secret Sativa
strains.description: An undisclosed secretive sativa parent.

strains.name: Skunk #1

strains.name: Hawaiian Sativa
strains.description: A native sativa from Hawaii.

strains.name: Laos Sativa
strains.description: A very long-flowering landrace from Laos.

strains.name: Super Skunk
strains.description: A beefed-up version of Skunk #1.

strains.name: Northern Lights #5

strains.name: Kali Mist

strains.name: Super Lemon Haze

strains.name: White Widow

strains.name: Arjan's Haze #1
strains.description: Deeply psychoactive and incredibly potent pure haze characteristics, perfect for spiritual uses and soaring creativity.

strains.name: Cheese

strains.name: Hawaiian Snow

strains.name: Jack Herer
strains.description: Green House representation of the legendary strain. It delivers heavy production of dense, trichome-laden buds.

strains.name: Great White Shark

strains.name: NL5 Haze Mist

strains.name: Orange Bud

strains.name: Hollands Hope

strains.name: White Widow

strains.name: Blueberry

strains.name: Mazar

strains.name: Skunk #11

strains.name: Euforia

strains.name: Power Plant

strains.name: Durban Poison
strains.description: The famous South African pure Sativa.

strains.name: Shaman

strains.name: Passion #1

strains.name: Master Kush
